raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Asserting a necessary precondition for meaningful achievement, functioning as motivational or philosophical guidance",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Thought without purpose cannot produce intelligent accomplishment",
    "Linking thought to purpose is both necessary and sufficient for intelligent accomplishment",
    "Accomplishment qualifies as 'intelligent' only when purpose-directed"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent as a conditional claim, though reliant on undefined terms whose meanings must be supplied by the reader",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The statement is useful when the audience seeks to cultivate focus, intentionality, or goal alignment and treats the phrasing as inspirational rather than strictly definitional",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement is misleading when taken as an exhaustive empirical claim that excludes the documented role of undirected exploration, serendipity, or subconscious processing in discovery and creation"
}
